HGSS.579.0000:
The train hasn’t come in...\f
I know! I’ll carry the passengers on
my back!\f
That won’t work.
HGSS.579.0001:
The Magnet Train is back in service!\f
Passengers need to go through the
gate for the automatic ticket check...\f
HGSS.579.0002:
...Beep!\f
I am so sorry, but you need a
Magnet Train Pass to get on\r
the Magnet Train...\f
HGSS.579.0003:
Passengers need to go through the
gate for the automatic ticket check...\f
HGSS.579.0004:
Ping...fwip!
Here is your Pass back.\f
This train is about to leave
for Saffron City.
HGSS.579.0005:
Enjoy the attractive and magnetic
journey!
HGSS.579.0006:
We are arriving at Goldenrod!
Goldenrod! The accent is on the “o”!
HGSS.579.0007:
Enjoy the attractive and magnetic
journey!\f
HGSS.579.0008:
I’m the President.\f
My dream was to build a train that
is faster than any Pokémon.\f
It really brings Johto much closer
to Kanto.
HGSS.579.0009:
We request that you make sure you
refrain from keeping large Pokémon out\r
at the station.
